title: Fluffy Lazy Sunday Herbal Stir-fry
description: A hearty and flavorful Mexican-inspired dish perfect for a lazy Sunday breakfast featuring celery salt as the star seasoning.

ingredients.name: celery root
ingredients.notes: Use for flavoring rather than eating

ingredients.name: celery salt
ingredients.notes: Optional, adds a touch of spice and celery flavor

instructions: Slice the celery root into thin rounds.
Peel and finely chop the green onions, removing the roots.
Core and finely dice the jalapeno peppers.
Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add sliced celery root and sauté for 5 minutes until lightly browned.
Add chopped green onions and jalapeno to the pan with a pinch of kosher salt, stirring well to combine.
Stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes until vegetables are heated through but still tender.
Season with celery salt if desired. Remove from heat immediately after adding it to avoid burning.
Garnish with chopped cilantro leaves and serve warm as a side dish or on top of eggs, cheese, or other breakfast components.
